blended.narrative: Winter Park is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 13.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 12" over the past week. Current depth: 43".
